'''Hasville Terson''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] living on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] prior to, and during, the early stages of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. He and his wife, [[Adray Terson|Adray]] owned and operated the [[Terson Comfort Carriers]] [[Air taxi/Legends|air taxi]] company. Hasville and Adray had a son, [[Hasray Terson|Hasray]], who was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by [[Denua Ku]].

{{Char-stub}}
